affected_locations.label: source
affected_locations.detail: Normal app upserts endpoint; direct authenticated Data API writes target same table.

evidence: Traced authenticated RLS source to service-role scheduled read and outbound send sink. Did not run dynamic SSRF reproduction in this discovery-only worker.
proof_gap: Need validation of web-push library endpoint restrictions, redirect behavior, private/metadata IP handling, and Supabase Edge network reachability.

source_or_privileged_boundary: Authenticated Data API write to public.web_push_subscriptions.endpoint; scheduled service-role cron reads it later.
closest_control: RLS owner_all limits row ownership but does not validate endpoint destination; cron secret gates trigger but not stored data safety.
impact_path: Attacker-controlled stored endpoint may cause scheduled service-role Edge Function to issue outbound requests to attacker-chosen destinations.
counterevidence: Normal UI uses browser PushManager; cron secret prevents direct function triggering; web-push library may reject malformed/non-HTTPS endpoints.
counterevidence_disposition: Not dispositive without validation because direct Data API writes remain allowed and no repository allowlist/private-address block was found.
